parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='GENERATING', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET video_url='pending:{{ $json.video_id }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'
UPDATE jobs SET status='WAITING_VIDEO_APPROVAL', video_url='{{ $json.video_url }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.job_id, video_url: $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.video_url, channel_id: $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.channel_id, user_id: $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.user_id }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='HeyGen video generation failed: {{ $json.status }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.channel_id, text: '❌ 영상 생성에 실패했습니다.\nJob ID: ' + $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.job_id.substring(0, 8) + '\n상태: ' + $('Poll HeyGen Status').item.json.status }) }}
